_comment: Shared test vectors for split_rotation_reply / splitRotationReply (ADR-025 memory flush folded into the rotation summary ask). Consumed by BOTH core/src/claude_session.rs tests and messaging/whatsapp/src/claude_session.test.ts — add cases here, never fork per-language copies. expect_durable: null means no durable section (whole reply is summary, or durable was 'none'/empty).

split_rotation_reply.name: both sections present
split_rotation_reply.reply:
SUMMARY:
- task A ongoing
- decided X

DURABLE:
- user prefers terse replies
- correction: use bootout not unload
split_rotation_reply.expect_durable:
- user prefers terse replies
- correction: use bootout not unload

split_rotation_reply.name: durable none is dropped
split_rotation_reply.reply:
SUMMARY:
- quiet day, small talk only

DURABLE:
none

split_rotation_reply.name: durable none with period and case
no headers at all degrades to summary-only
durable mentioned mid-bullet is not a header
split_rotation_reply.reply:
SUMMARY:
- discussed DURABLE: goods pricing
- decided Y

DURABLE:
- user buys appliances in July
split_rotation_reply.expect_summary:
- discussed DURABLE: goods pricing
- decided Y

split_rotation_reply.name: preamble before summary header is tolerated
split_rotation_reply.reply:
Here is the summary.
SUMMARY:
- bullet one
DURABLE:
- fact one

split_rotation_reply.name: content on the header lines is kept
split_rotation_reply.reply:
SUMMARY: - inline bullet
DURABLE: - inline fact
